year. 

SHORT NAME: MFP_PRTCPTN_END_RSN_CD 

LONG NAME: MFP_PRTCPTN_END_RSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Money Follows the Person 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 00 = Default ― No MFP Participation 
01 = Completed 365 days of participation 
02 = Suspended eligibility 
03 = Re-institutionalized 
04 = Died 
05 = Moved 
06 = No longer needed services 
07 = Other 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: —
